pages.text:
§6§lWANDERER'S
    ANECDOTE§r

§7§oReflections from one
who walked every path
and found treasure in
the strangest places...§r

§8— The Nomad Sage

§6§lFour Paths, One Truth§r

§7§oWhether you cast
a line, swing a pick,
tend the fields, or
face the beasts...

The world rewards
all who persist.
Treasure finds those
who seek it.§r

§6§lThe Weight of Dreams§r

§7§oI've seen common
folk find wonders,
and kings find dust.

The difference? Their
dreams. The brighter
they burn within you,
the more the world
notices... and gives.§r

§6§lOf Glowing Beasts§r

§7§oSome creatures walk
with an inner light.
They are stronger,
rarer, more dangerous.

Defeat them, and they
may share a portion
of their radiance
with you.§r

§6§lThe Dreamer's Gate§r

§7§oCertain treasures
hide behind doors
that only open for
those who dream
boldly enough.

Build your spirit
first. The rarest
gifts require a
worthy recipient.§r

§6§lWhat the Crates Hold§r

§7§oI've opened thousands.
Tools, armor, strange
brews, companions
waiting to be freed,
relics of power...

Each one different.
Each one a gift from
a world that wants
to be discovered.§r

§6§lBottled Starlight§r

§7§oSometimes you find
strange potions.
Drink them.

The best ones taste
like crystallized
hope, and for a
time, your dreams
shine brighter.

§8Walk far, friend.§r
